response.step_by_step_log: I identified the song "Ash Again" from the on-screen text. I searched for "Ash Again" and Gawr Gura. The song is in English, so the original lyrics and English translation are the same. The rest of the video is a speech, not a song.
response.global_summary: The video features a virtual performance by Gawr Gura of her song "Ash Again," followed by a heartfelt farewell speech.

scenes.description: Gawr Gura performs her song "Ash Again" on a virtual stage.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
Face to face with time again
We walk once more to the end
Burn it down, burn it down
Waves can't put out my flame
In the abyss is where I will hide
Let them drown, burn it down
They say the memory of me is fading
I've heard it all before
Don't tell me everyone around is waiting
And they all say
Tear it down, burn it down
And they'll all pay
When I tear it down, burn it down
When the world falls through
And all is ash again
While you all pretend
If this is the end, I'll do it again
We swim against the current's aim
In dark we change as smoke returns to rain
Navigating sunken depths and all of its debris
And no more hands upon my words, they only speak for me
For all the ones who try to silence thunder
I'm the wave that pulls you down and under
Every day I'll stand with me
And I'll fight the drought of shallow sea
As ships sail winds of jealousy
I'll listen carefully

scenes.description: Gawr Gura gives a heartfelt speech to her audience.
